description: Address of a letter from an unknown sender, in Rashīd (Rosetta), to Moshe ha-Levi, in Fustat/Cairo. Dating: ca. 18th century. Reused on recto for a halakhic treatise on shirṭuṭ (drawing up the lines) when writing a Bible. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: מכתב בעברית מ-Rosetta לקהיר. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
